Description: Blasters can use Basic Attacks to deal DMG and regenerate more Energy
Masterminds regenerate Energy every second and excel at dealing DMG with their Skill.
Explorers have Omnileech, balancing DMG dealing and survivability
Protectors can regnerate Energy when hit. Opponenets will prioritize attacking them
Mascots regenerate Energy every second. They can weaken opponents or buff allied Anima.
